lead: Recent discussions around climate change highlight the urgency of addressing environmental issues amidst technological advancements and societal challenges.

stories.title: University of Arizona students boo Eric Schmidt’s AI cheerleading during commencement
stories.summary: During the University of Arizona's commencement ceremony, former Google CEO Eric Schmidt faced backlash from students as he spoke about AI. The students expressed their frustration, reflecting broader concerns about job security and climate change. Schmidt acknowledged the rationality of their fears, which include the deteriorating climate and political instability, emphasizing the need for a more responsible approach to technology.
